overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Death Stranding showing a delivery character with a large cargo backpack traversing a rocky canyon toward a majestic waterfall. The character walks along uneven terrain, passes through areas of sparse and dense vegetation, and stops at the water's edge to gaze up at the towering cascade.

events.description: character steps from smoother path onto uneven rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon carrying a large cargo backpack, navigating the rocky ground

entered.detail: tall dark gray rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
steep rocky cliff forming the right boundary of the canyon
tall waterfall cascading down the canyon wall in the distance
uneven dirt and stone ground with scattered rocks
patches of dry yellow grass along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky canyon path with steep cliff faces on both sides. Sparse vegetation dots the landscape as the character approaches a distant waterfall visible at the canyon's end. The terrain transitions from a smoother path to uneven rocky ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with rocky shore and vegetation

events.description: entering area with denser green vegetation and approaching the water pool
character slows and stops at the water's edge near the waterfall base

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating the rocky terrain toward the waterfall, moving through patches of green vegetation until reaching the water's edge

entered.detail: lush green shrubs and bushes growing near the water
pool of water at the base of the waterfall with visible current

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an area with denser green vegetation approaching the waterfall base. The ground becomes more uneven with large rocks near the water's edge. Mist from the falls becomes visible as the character stops at the rocky shore of the pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base looking up vertical cliff face

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up the full height of the waterfall
view shifts to look directly up into bright sky above the cliff rim

agents.ego_description: standing still at the water's edge, looking up at the towering waterfall and cliff face above

entered.detail: the edge of the cliff where the waterfall originates, silhouetted against bright sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the waterfall's base as the camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the cascading water. The view looks up the sheer cliff face toward the bright sky above, with mist from the falls creating a hazy atmosphere. The perspective emphasizes the scale of the natural formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow rocky canyon that culminates in a breathtaking encounter with a towering waterfall. It begins with the character navigating a path between steep cliff faces, where the terrain gradually shifts from a smooth trail to uneven, rocky ground. As the character advances, the landscape transitions into an area of denser green vegetation and larger boulders, with a fine mist beginning to drift across the air. The scene then reaches the rocky shore of a pool where the character comes to a halt, before the camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the cascading water. This final ascent tracks the sheer cliff face toward a bright sky, leaving the viewer immersed in the hazy, atmospheric spray of the falls.
